    Conversion of a Unix time in milliseconds into a Java date object

    Conversion of a Unix time in microseconds into a Java Instant object
    UNKNOWN - Enum constant in enum class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.enums.Gender
     
    updateAdmissionStatuses(Map) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.logic.KiraHandlingLogic
    Updates the status of each CoreCaseData according to the rule: - RE_ADMISSION if the most recent previous case for the same patient has a discharge date within 182 days (inclusive) before the current admission date.
    updateConditionEncounterReferences(List, String, String) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.logic.KiraHandlingLogic
    Updates the encounter references for conditions of the cases that get merged.
    updateIntensiveCareDays(Map, List) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.logic.KiraHandlingLogic
    Updates ICU day information on CoreCaseData records using performed dates from procedures.
    updateProcedureEncounterReferences(List, String, String) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.logic.KiraHandlingLogic
    Updates the encounter references for procedures of the cases that get merged.
